nemo_archive.detail: AUTHORITATIVE source for this variant. NeMo tar archive containing model_config.yaml + PyTorch state_dict. All dims, frontend, tokenizer, and dtype facts come from inside this archive (read at Stage 3 convert time), matching the rest of the parakeet family.

config.detail: Present on the HF repo as auxiliary HF-Transformers metadata (ParakeetForCTC, model_type=parakeet_ctc, vocab_size=1025). config.torch_dtype=bfloat16 is MISLEADING — likely reflects training/optimizer dtype, not storage. Not used as the source of truth for this port; the .nemo archive is canonical.

preprocessor.detail: Present on HF; values cross-checked against model.cfg.preprocessor inside the .nemo. n_mels=80, hop=160, fft=512, preemph=0.97.

safetensors_metadata.detail: Header-only floating dtype distribution: F32=950, I64=24. All floating tensors F32 — agrees with the .nemo state_dict and contradicts config.torch_dtype=bfloat16. The HF safetensors are not the conversion path; .nemo is.

model_card.detail: Pure CTC, FastConformer-Large 0.6B encoder, lowercase English, per-set WER published

reference_modeling_code.detail: Encoder shares structure with TDT-0.6B-v2 (FastConformer-Large 24L). CTC head is new for parakeet but covered by sensevoice/funasr_nano families.

dtype.evidence: Authoritative source: PyTorch state_dict inside parakeet-ctc-0.6b.nemo, which is float32 (matches the rest of the parakeet family's convention). HF safetensors header (F32=950, I64=24) independently confirms F32 storage. The HF config.torch_dtype=bfloat16 field is misleading metadata — likely the training-time optimizer dtype — and is NOT the intake's source of truth. Project policy preserves storage dtype: ship F32 as reference dtype; BF16 produced in Stage 5 quant matrix.

reference_rationale: NeMo first-party. ParakeetForCTC is also HF Transformers loadable, but NeMo's preprocessor + CTC decoding remain the authoritative parity reference. The 0.6B CTC variant is the natural first CTC port in this family — encoder dims match TDT-0.6B-v2 exactly; only the head differs.
known_risks: Conversion sources from the .nemo archive (matching the rest of the parakeet family), NOT from HF config.json + safetensors. The HF safetensors copy on the repo is parallel/redundant with the .nemo state_dict; we ignore it to keep one authoritative path.

HF config.torch_dtype=bfloat16 is misleading metadata (training/optimizer dtype, not storage). Storage (both .nemo state_dict and HF safetensors) is F32. Preflight is .nemo-aware and skips this field for NeMo families with a .nemo sibling — no false-positive FAIL.

First encoder-CTC port in parakeet — needs CTC linear head + greedy decode (collapse repeats, drop blanks). Cross-reference src/arch/sensevoice/ and src/arch/funasr_nano/ for existing CTC C++ code patterns.
Encoder dims confirmed identical to TDT-0.6B-v2 (24L/1024d/8h) — full encoder reuse.
n_mels=80 differs from v2/v3 (128). Encoder feat_in must reflect this. Source: model.cfg.preprocessor inside the .nemo (cross-checked against the parallel preprocessor_config.json on HF).
Standard parakeet risks: dw_striding mask, rel_pos attention, preemph=0.97, per-feature norm.
vocab_size=1025 (1024 SP + blank). CTC blank by convention is id 1024.

intake_gaps.reason: blank=1024 declared by convention (last id of model output dim). If tokenizer_config or generation_config exposes a different blank id, prefer that.
